purpose: Round-11 locked mesh2motion body manifest for the d-full-match Showroom, consolidating dynamic hand-bone weapons, UV2 body-texture skin, small localized gore marks, and scaled modular armour props.
notes: Round-11 schema 10 manifest keeps the root mesh2motion body as the universal substrate for all eight personas.
Weapons are consolidated on dynamic hand-bone attachment only; the static root-socket negative control is retired from manifest/UI selection.
Skin is narrowed to duelist-family pbr_texture_atlas and trader-family pattern_texture variants, both routed through the UV2 body texture shader for full-body coverage.
Round-11 A1 locks armour to scaled modular props following live BoneAttachment3D sockets.
The prior flat donated armour coverage candidate is removed from live manifest data and runtime selection.

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: LICENSE-CC0.MD states 3D models, blend files, rigs, and animations are CC0.

body.notes: Shared Round-7 consolidated mesh2motion body for all personas; Scott Petrovic / Mesh2Motion CC0 human-base animation GLB selected after Round-6 showroom evaluation.

corpseBody.notes: Shared mesh2motion body, paused on the Death01 final frame. Per-persona corpse-skin variants apply at instance time; no standalone corpse GLB remains.

skin.rationale: Round-5 palette baseline retained as the control sample so the other seven skin techniques have a no-technique anchor.
skin.sourcePack: engineer-procedural-fallback (Round-5 palette_flat control; retained intentionally per Round-8 research log)

corpse.rationale: Round-11 WP-G locks live gore to amplified camper-style small individual marks: many compact decals pinned to mesh2motion bones so gore stays on the body through motion, with splash variety but no floor projection.

deathTreatment.rationale: Round-12 keeps this as a separate decoupled baked deathTreatment delta for non-sprinter personas: hide two mesh2motion bones and pin stump gore to the live skeleton without swapping the body.

corpse.sourcePack: OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0 + OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0 + CC0 blood splatter textures

assets.notes: rat persona: palette_flat R10 skin control + Round-11 amplified small_bone_attached_marks corpse gore. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-12 restores the R10 skin instance while keeping the separate decoupled deathTreatment accepted delta.

round8Evaluation.goreVariant: Round-11 WP-G locked small_bone_attached_marks live gore: >=10 mesh2motion-bone marks with splash variety, plus separate decoupled dismemberment_baked bone_hide deathTreatment.
round8Evaluation.armor: No active modular armour prop for this persona in A1; armour rendering uses the locked prop lane when an overlay is declared
round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore; armour flat coverage candidate removed

Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-12 keeps armorOverlay=quaternius_chest_plate via catalogPropId with fitScale/propOffset.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_chest_plate
armorOverlay.rationale: Chest piece tests the Round-8 modular sub-mesh armor path against the torso where wrapping matters most.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 armour prop; Round-10 attaches the prop under a live BoneAttachment3D on spine_03 instead of injecting a single-bone identity Skin. Round-11 A1 applies fitScale=0.38 to child mesh transforms for body fit.

round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore plus scaled modular armour prop

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_crown_helmet
armorOverlay.rationale: Helmet tests modular_submesh armor at a high-motion head attachment point distinct from torso armor.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 armour prop; Round-10 attaches the prop under a live BoneAttachment3D on head instead of injecting a single-bone identity Skin. Round-11 A1 applies fitScale=0.38 to child mesh transforms for body fit.

skin.rationale: Dark body with neon trim samples cyberpunk glow without depending on bloom and fits the held-position camper read.

corpse.rationale: Chest and abdomen viscera projections make the death-pose body look opened up rather than merely tinted. Round-10 re-approach: split into many small localized marks so each stays near one dominant bone instead of spanning joints as a broad patch. Round-12 preserves the R10 viscera instance verbatim, then amplifies by count/density with additional small decals capped at 0.12.

deathTreatment.rationale: Round-12 keeps this as a separate decoupled baked deathTreatment delta for non-sprinter personas: hide two mesh2motion bones and pin stump gore to the live skeleton without swapping the body.

assets.notes: camper persona: emissive_trim_shader R10 skin with local trim mask + restored viscera_projection R10 live corpse, amplified by additional small decals capped at 0.12. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-12 keeps the separate deathTreatment only as a non-live accepted delta.

round8Evaluation.skinTreatment: emissive_trim_shader with sourced fabric base reference
round8Evaluation.goreVariant: viscera_projection sourced gib-sheet control split into small localized Round-10 marks
round8Evaluation.armor: No active modular armour prop for this persona in A1; armour rendering uses the locked prop lane when an overlay is declared
round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore; armour flat coverage candidate removed

skin.rationale: Per-part material assignments sample mismatched speed-build body segmentation without adding accessories or changing the mesh.

corpse.rationale: Shared-body-only bone hiding with stump gore tests a mesh-level dismemberment read without introducing a second corpse GLB.

assets.notes: sprinter persona: multi_material_split R10 skin + restored R10 dismemberment_baked live corpse gore restricted to shared-body-only bone_hide per Round-7 amendment A1. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-12 does not carry the Round-11 universal deathTreatment copy on sprinter.

round8Evaluation.armor: No active modular armour prop for this persona in A1; armour rendering uses the locked prop lane when an overlay is declared
round8Evaluation.adherence: mesh_baked corpse state plus uv_painted skin

source.title: Bucket Helmet
source.creator: Lucian Pavel
source.sourceStatus: newly staged under round11-breadth from existing local CC0 source archive

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: OpenGameArt page exposes the CC0 license icon/link for this asset.

armourProps.rationale: A true separate helmet prop gives the Round-11 selector a non-Quaternius head-slot silhouette and preserves the rigid bone-attached semantics. Round-12 scales it up from the buried R11 value and lowers it from the high head-socket placement and pulls it back for visible helmet placement.

weaponAttachModes.purpose: Consolidated Round-10 weapon path; the weapon follows the mesh2motion hand through idle, motion, attack, and death clips.

armorApproaches.purpose: Rigid CC0 props parented under live BoneAttachment3D sockets with fitScale folded into child mesh transforms plus propOffset applied in socket space; expected to protrude/clip rather than wrap.
